news.title: Anthropic’s Pentagon deal is a cautionary tale for startups chasing federal contracts
news.summary: The Pentagon has officially designated Anthropic a supply-chain risk after the two failed to agree on how much control the military should have over its AI models, including its use in autonomous weapons and mass domestic surveillance. news.title: Claude’s consumer growth surge continues after Pentagon deal debacle
news.summary: Claude's app is now seeing more new installs than ChatGPT and is growing its daily active users.

news.title: India PC shipments surpass pandemic peak as first-time users upgrade
news.summary: Pandemic-driven lockdowns exposed many people in India to PCs for the first time, expanding the country's PC userbase and creating demand for upgrades as those devices age.

news.title: These are the countries moving to ban social media for children
news.summary: Australia was the first country to issue a ban in late 2025, aiming to reduce the pressures and risks that young users may face on social media, including cyberbullying, social media addiction, and exposure to predators.

news.title: TriZetto confirms 3.4M people’s health and personal data was stolen during breach
news.summary: Health tech giant TriZetto has confirmed that more than 3.4 million people had personal and health information stolen in a 2024 cyberattack, which the company failed to detect for almost a year.
